result.stdout:
Description:
  CloudWorks Email CLI

Usage:
  mail-cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --json          Output in JSON format
  --no-color      Disable color output
  --debug         Show debug information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  configure             Set up API connection
  accounts              Manage email accounts
  messages              View and manage messages
  send                  Send an email
  reply <message-id>    Reply to a message
  forward <message-id>  Forward a message
  search <query>        Search messages across accounts
  drafts                Manage email drafts
  folders               View email folders
  threads               View email threads
  batch                 Batch operations on messages
  digest                Get email digest summary
  contacts              View extracted contacts
  health <account-id>   Check account health
  webhooks              Manage webhooks
  attachments           View and download message attachments

commands.payload:
Description:
  CloudWorks Email CLI

Usage:
  mail-cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --json          Output in JSON format
  --no-color      Disable color output
  --debug         Show debug information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  configure             Set up API connection
  accounts              Manage email accounts
  messages              View and manage messages
  send                  Send an email
  reply <message-id>    Reply to a message
  forward <message-id>  Forward a message
  search <query>        Search messages across accounts
  drafts                Manage email drafts
  folders               View email folders
  threads               View email threads
  batch                 Batch operations on messages
  digest                Get email digest summary
  contacts              View extracted contacts
  health <account-id>   Check account health
  webhooks              Manage webhooks
  attachments           View and download message attachments

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage email accounts

Usage:
  mail-cli accounts [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --json          Output in JSON format
  --no-color      Disable color output
  --debug         Show debug information

Commands:
  list  List connected email accounts

result.stdout:
Description:
  List connected email accounts

Usage:
  mail-cli accounts list [options]

Options:
  --provider <provider>  Filter by provider
  --status <status>      Filter by status (connected, error, disconnected)
  --sort <sort>          Sort by (name, email)
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
  --json                 Output in JSON format
  --no-color             Disable color output
  --debug                Show debug information

result.stdout:

  Download an attachment

  mail-cli attachments download <message-id> <attachment-id> [options]

Arguments:
  <message-id>
  <attachment-id>

Options:
  --output <output>  Output file path (defaults to attachment filename)
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
  --json             Output in JSON format
  --no-color         Disable color output
  --debug            Show debug information

  Set up API connection

  --api-token <api-token>  API token for authentication
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information
  --json                   Output in JSON format
  --no-color               Disable color output
  --debug                  Show debug information

result.stdout:
Description:
  List contacts

Usage:
  mail-cli contacts list [options]

Options:
  --since <since>          Time period (e.g., 24h, 7d)
  --account <account>      Filter by account ID
  --search <search>        Search by name or email
  --sort <sort>            Sort order (name, email, count, recent)
  --page <page>            Page number [default: 1]
  --page-size <page-size>  Page size [default: 10]
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information
  --json                   Output in JSON format
  --no-color               Disable color output
  --debug                  Show debug information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage email drafts

Usage:
  mail-cli drafts [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --json          Output in JSON format
  --no-color      Disable color output
  --debug         Show debug information

Commands:
  list               List drafts
  get <draft-id>     Get a draft by ID
  create             Create a draft
  update <draft-id>  Update a draft
  send <draft-id>    Send a draft
  delete <draft-id>  Delete a draft

result.stdout:
Description:
  Create a draft

Usage:
  mail-cli drafts create [options]

Options:
  --account <account> (REQUIRED)  Account ID
  --to <to>                       Recipients, comma-separated
  --subject <subject>             Email subject
  --body <body>                   Text body
  --html-body <html-body>         HTML body
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information
  --json                          Output in JSON format
  --no-color                      Disable color output
  --debug                         Show debug information

  Forward a message

  --to <to> (REQUIRED)  Recipient email(s), comma-separated
  --cc <cc>             CC recipients, comma-separated
  --bcc <bcc>           BCC recipients, comma-separated
  --text <text>         Additional text to include
  -?, -h, --help        Show help and usage information

  --no-color            Disable color output
  --debug               Show debug information

  <message-id>

result.stdout:
Description:
  List messages

Usage:
  mail-cli messages list [options]

Options:
  --account <account>        Filter by account ID
  --folder <folder>          Filter by folder ID
  --unread                   Show only unread messages
  --starred                  Show only starred messages
  --has-attachments          Show only messages with attachments
  --start-date <start-date>  Filter by start date
  --end-date <end-date>      Filter by end date
  --sort <sort>              Sort order (date, date_asc, subject, from)
  --query <query>            Full-text search query
  --page <page>              Page number [default: 1]
  --page-size <page-size>    Page size (max 100) [default: 10]
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
  --json                     Output in JSON format
  --no-color                 Disable color output
  --debug                    Show debug information

commands.payload:
Description:
  List messages

Usage:
  mail-cli messages list [options]

Options:
  --account <account>        Filter by account ID
  --folder <folder>          Filter by folder ID
  --unread                   Show only unread messages
  --starred                  Show only starred messages
  --has-attachments          Show only messages with attachments
  --start-date <start-date>  Filter by start date
  --end-date <end-date>      Filter by end date
  --sort <sort>              Sort order (date, date_asc, subject, from)
  --query <query>            Full-text search query
  --page <page>              Page number [default: 1]
  --page-size <page-size>    Page size (max 100) [default: 10]
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
  --json                     Output in JSON format
  --no-color                 Disable color output
  --debug                    Show debug information

Description:
  Manage webhooks

Usage:
  mail-cli webhooks [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --json          Output in JSON format
  --no-color      Disable color output
  --debug         Show debug information

Commands:
  list                              List webhooks
  get <webhook-id>                  Get webhook details
  create                            Create a webhook
  update <webhook-id>               Update a webhook
  delete <webhook-id>               Delete a webhook
  regenerate-secret <webhook-id>    Regenerate webhook secret
  deliveries <webhook-id>           List webhook deliveries
  retry <webhook-id> <delivery-id>  Retry a failed delivery
  purge <webhook-id>                Purge all deliveries for a webhook
  templates                         List webhook templates
